title: Issue with SPARQL insert
key_bug_features: SPARQL INSERT with complex WHERE clause fails
bug_features_seed: INSERT { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { ?s <http://data.linkedevents.org/def/location#businessType> <http://data.linkedevents.org/kos/3cixty/bar> } } WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { ?s <http://data.linkedevents.org/def/location#businessType> ?category . } FILTER (REGEX (STR (?category), 'bars$', 'i')) . FILTER(NOT EXISTS{?s <http://data.linkedevents.org/def/location#businessType> <http://data.linkedevents.org/kos/3cixty/bar>}) . };
